faqs.question: What does commercial pest control cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Commercial pest control in Kew Gardens typically ranges from $175 to $1,500 per month, depending on your business size, type of establishment, severity of pest issues, and frequency of service. Restaurants and food service businesses generally require more intensive treatment than office spaces. We provide free inspections and customized quotes based on your specific needs.

faqs.question: What types of businesses in Kew Gardens need commercial pest control?
faqs.answer: All Kew Gardens businesses benefit from professional pest control, including restaurants, cafes, office buildings, retail stores, medical facilities, salons, gyms, property management companies, and apartment buildings. Food service establishments are required by health codes to maintain regular pest control services, while other businesses protect their reputation and comply with lease requirements through preventive treatment.

faqs.question: How often should my Kew Gardens business receive pest control service?
faqs.answer: Most Kew Gardens commercial properties require monthly pest control treatments to maintain a pest-free environment and stay compliant with health regulations. Restaurants and food establishments typically need bi-weekly or monthly service, while offices and retail spaces may do well with monthly or quarterly visits. We'll assess your property and business type to recommend the optimal service frequency.

faqs.question: Do you offer discreet pest control for Kew Gardens businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide completely discreet commercial pest control services in Kew Gardens. Our technicians arrive in unmarked vehicles, work during off-hours when requested, and use odorless treatments that won't disturb customers or employees. We understand the importance of protecting your business reputation while effectively eliminating pests, and we coordinate all services around your operational schedule.
